title: Robust Okonomiyaki Burger
description: A twist on traditional okonomiyaki, this burger combines the flavors of Japan with the richness of a beef patty. The robust flavors are balanced by the freshness of rocket and the crunch of roasted ingredients.

ingredients.name: Robust Okonomiyaki Sauce
ingredients.notes: make your own or use store-bought

instructions: 2. Form beef patties and season with salt and pepper.
3. Grill beef patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
5. Spread okonomiyaki sauce on bottom bun.
6. Add beef patty, roasted onion, and Japanese cucumber.
7. Top with rocket greens and roasted sesame seeds.
8. Dust with okonomiyaki flour for extra crunch.
9. Add top bun and serve immediately.
